Skill Path: Faith

You are a well-informed member of your faith.

While developing your skills in Religion you chose to focus specifically on Faith, learning basic techniques.You gain the following trained feats: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.BqceQIKE0lwIS98s]{Pilgrim's Token}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-skillpaths.pf2e-skillpath-compendium.Item.QvBIYW6aAqoiyim3]{Exhort the Faithful}.

This path focuses on @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge}.

  • Trained: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.BqceQIKE0lwIS98s]{Pilgrim's Token}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-skillpaths.pf2e-skillpath-compendium.Item.QvBIYW6aAqoiyim3]{Exhort the Faithful}
